name: @flying-pillow/mission-workspace
description: Mission workspace and filesystem manager for the full monorepo.

scripts.clean: rm -rf .turbo apps/airport/web/build apps/airport/web/.svelte-kit apps/airport/native/src-tauri/target packages/*/build apps/*/*/build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission run install:dev && MISSION_SURFACE_PATH=$PWD MISSION_DAEMON_RUNTIME_MODE=${MISSION_DAEMON_RUNTIME_MODE:-source} pnpm --parallel --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core --filter @flying-pillow/mission-airport-web --filter @flying-pillow/mission run dev
